title: Phase State Envelope
description: Wire format workflow returns from MCP tools (sync with spec 04 TypedDict)

status.description: The current status of the phase execution

row.description: The row this envelope belongs to

session_id.description: Opaque session UUID for resume keying

opaque_state.description: Workflow's internal state - agentic MUST NOT mutate

blocked_reason.description: Human-readable reason for block; required when status is blocked_*

resume_token.description: Token to resume the phase; required when status is blocked_*
